summary.title: Predictive Maintenance & Workflow Automation
summary.submissionFormat: PDF + Excel compliance matrix, emailed to procurement@vanguardmfg.com
summary.overview: Vanguard operates 11 plants across North America with significant unplanned downtime exposure. The buyer wants an AI platform that ingests OT/ICS sensor data, predicts equipment failure, and triggers maintenance workflows. Deployment must be on-prem due to OT segmentation policy.

strengths: AI workflow automation translates well to maintenance triage
Pricing model is flexible for multi-site deployments
weaknesses: Default deployment model is SaaS; on-prem is a custom path

compliance.requirement: Provide on-prem deployment architecture with air-gap option.

evidence.snippet: On-prem appendix exists, air-gap not yet documented

compliance.requirement: 24/7 support model description with named regional teams.

evidence.snippet: Multi-site enterprise tier with 18% discount at 5+ sites

items: Document air-gap deployment topology and update operator handbook.
Confirm OT data ingestion approach (OPC UA, MQTT, custom protocol).
Source two industrial customer references — none on file.
Determine path to ISA/IEC 62443 compliance attestation: gap assessment now, or commit to roadmap.

draft.body: Unplanned downtime is the largest controllable cost in Vanguard's operations. Lyra AI proposes a predictive maintenance and workflow automation platform deployable on-prem within Vanguard's OT segmentation envelope. [INDUSTRIAL NARRATIVE — needs operations-specific framing from Maya].
